positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical geometric mandala pattern composed of interconnected tropical flora and celestial motifs. The design features abstract elements like flowing stylized vines, monstera leaves, papyrus reeds, and crescent moon shapes, arranged in a repeating, continuous pattern. Use a color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, cream beige, and earthy mustard yellow. The lines should be crisp, clean, and highly defined, suitable for screen printing on fabric. The composition should be centralized, ensuring strong readability and visual impact across a square surface. Style: Art Deco mixed with Bohemian geometric abstraction. Composition: Full-coverage repeating seamless pattern, symmetrical, flat vector look, high contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, realistic photo, 3d render, messy, messy lines
